function.arguments: {"command":"powershell \"Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -like '*api*' -or $_.ProcessName -like '*server*' -or $_.ProcessName -like '*service*'} | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, CPU, @{Name='Memory(MB)';Expression={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,2)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize\""}
function.name: shell_command
